meaning: n.食道,咽喉,水道,峡谷,锯齿间空隙,[建]水落管,水槽
examples: A piece of food got stuck in his gullet.
She has a piece of bread sticked in her gullet.
Experiment conditions and results are as follows: (1) Indoor water gullet experiment.
In its natural state, the white, viscous liquid slides down your gullet with an earthy tang.
The form in which those carbs make it to your gullet is where it gets interesting.
